sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal f method: test multiple f values using Black commodity option formula, calculate HPR for each f, select f that maximizes GHPR (Geometric Average HPR). Position size is proportional to optimal f constrained by 8 standard deviations of price movement. Formula: HPR(T,U) = (1+f*(Z(T,U-Y)/S-1))^P(T,U)

source_rule_text: Position size is determined by testing different f values using the Black commodity option formula to calculate Holding Period Returns (HPR), selecting the f value that maximizes the geometric average HPR (GHPR).
